Beaulieu’s Beginnings
Did you know?
For over 50 years,
Beaulieu Autojumble has
been the Uk’s largest,
earning its famous
reputation: ‘can’t find it
here? It probably doesn’t
exist’
With 23 years of experience, this menu is created with
a passion for fresh ingredients and using local
produce where possible. My favourite has to be the
Pork Gyros or the Cadillac Pizza
Enjoy!
Chris
Your Head Chef

All our food is freshly made on the premises. At busy times there may be a delay, please bear with us.
V – Vegetarian |VG – Vegan| GF – Not containing Gluten
All our food is prepared in a kitchen where nuts, gluten and other allergens are present, and our menu descriptions do not include all ingredients. If you have a
food allergy or intolerance, please let us know before ordering. Full allergen information for all dishes is available upon request. A 10% service charge is added
to tables of 10 or more
Did you know?
During World War II,
Beaulieu was a secret
training base for
Special Operations
Executive (SOE) agents,
including spies sent
into occupied Europe!

Each one of the 5000
New Forest ponies is

a medieval ID system
